title: Add Webcalypt Image Generator to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Webcalypt joins the gallery
gist.blurb: The Webcalypt Image Generator has officially sprouted in our community garden. Just describe what you want to see, and watch the pixels assemble themselves.
gist.summary: Added the Webcalypt Image Generator to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and access the Webcalypt text-to-image tool directly from the Pollinations app directory.
gist.visual_concept: Webcalypt is a text-to-image generator. The visual should represent text transforming into art. Polly the bee as an artist (wearing a beret) alongside the Monitor Robot who is displaying a beautiful landscape on its screen, representing the generated image.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, hovering next to a cute chunky monitor robot whose screen displays a beautiful glowing landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, hovering next to a cute chunky monitor robot whose screen displays a beautiful glowing landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
